name: mailbridge-mcp
description: Safely search, read, and draft mail through accounts configured in macOS Mail.

interface.shortDescription: Connect Codex safely to macOS Mail.
interface.longDescription: A local-only bridge to accounts already configured in macOS Mail, with bounded reads, explicit partial-search reporting, and draft-only composition workflows.
defaultPrompt: Show unread mail from one selected account.
Find a message, then summarize it safely.
Draft a reply and wait for my approval.
